message.thinking:
We need to produce JSON array with 3 objects. Each object has keys: question (string: "Chapters", "Description", "Structure" depending on question), feedback, complies boolean.

We need to evaluate the given text against each question.

Given text:

"Ievads ietver trīs daļas:
1. Tēmas aktualitātes pamatojums un/vai pētījuma motivācija. 
2. Noslēguma darba mērķis un tā sasniegšanai izvirzītie uzdevumi.
3. Īss katras noslēguma darba nodaļas un pielikumu satura apraksts. 
Ievada apjoms ir 1–2 lappuses."

So it's describing introduction structure. The questions:

1. Chapters: Does the text list the main sections of the thesis? The text lists three parts of introduction, not main sections of thesis. So it does not list main sections of thesis. So compliance false. Feedback: It only lists introduction parts, not main thesis sections.

2. Description: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? It describes contents of each introduction part. So yes it briefly describes. So compliance true. Feedback: It gives brief description of each introduction part.

3. Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? The text only describes introduction, not overall thesis structure. So cannot understand general structure. So compliance false. Feedback: It only covers introduction, missing overall structure.

Thus produce array accordingly. Ensure JSON array with objects.
